implementation_notes: Implementation via task-work delegation. Files planned: 0, Files actual: 0
requirements_addressed: AC-007 first-wins idempotency (Group D + Group I)

completion_promises.evidence: Created tests/integration/test_mode_a_concurrency_and_integrity.py with 16 tests organized into 9 test classes mapping 1:1 to the acceptance criteria. File is importable, collects under pytest, and passes ruff/black.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Two-concurrent-builds test (Group F): distinct correlation_ids, interleaved next_turn, distinct autobuild task_id, approval pause resolves only on matching build_id, second build product-owner dispatches without waiting for first build's autobuild
completion_promises.evidence: TestTwoConcurrentBuilds has three tests: (1) test_distinct_autobuild_task_ids_and_correlation_ids — drives two builds via asyncio.gather, asserts distinct task_ids and per-build correlation_ids on the lifecycle bus; (2) test_approval_response_only_resolves_matching_build — uses real ApprovalSubscriber + InMemoryNats with per-build subjects, asserts response on build-A's mirror leaves build-B's wait pending; (3) test_second_build_dispatches_while_first_autobuild_in_flight — build-1 dispatches AUTOBUILD while build-2 dispatches PRODUCT_OWNER in the same gather without cross-talk.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Multi-feature integration test (Group H): 3-feature catalogue produces one feature-spec, one feature-plan, one autobuild stage entry per feature, one PR-review pause per feature, per-feature artefact paths attributed correctly
completion_promises.evidence: TestMultiFeatureCatalogue.test_three_features_produce_one_inner_loop_dispatch_each drives a 3-feature build through the supervisor's canonical-order reasoning model; asserts exactly 3 FEATURE_SPEC, 3 FEATURE_PLAN, 3 AUTOBUILD dispatcher calls, 3 PR-review submissions (one per feature_id), and walks the artefact paths recorded per (build, stage, feature) to assert no path is attributed to more than one feature.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Per-feature sequencing test (Group D ASSUM-006): three-feature catalogue, no second autobuild dispatch begins while a first autobuild is still in non-terminal lifecycle
completion_promises.evidence: TestPerFeatureSequencing.test_three_feature_catalogue_serialises_autobuilds dispatches FEAT-1's autobuild (turn 1), simulates 'running_wave' lifecycle, attempts FEAT-2 (turn 2) and asserts WAITING_PRIOR_AUTOBUILD; then marks FEAT-1 'completed' and asserts FEAT-3 dispatches successfully (turn 3). autobuild_dispatcher.calls count is asserted at every step (1 → 1 → 2).

completion_promises.criterion_text: Correlation threading test (Group I): every published lifecycle event for a build carries the same correlation_id from queue to terminal
completion_promises.evidence: TestCorrelationThreading.test_every_lifecycle_event_for_one_build_threads_one_correlation_id drives a 2-feature build to completion, walks every event in FakeLifecycleBus.for_build('build-CID'), and asserts the set of correlation_ids is exactly {'cid-deterministic-XY'} — proving no drift between stages. Cross-build isolation also asserted.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Calibration priors snapshot test (Group I): capture snapshot at build start, mutate operator's calibration history mid-run, assert later stages still use the priors snapshot from build start
completion_promises.evidence: TestCalibrationPriorsSnapshot has two tests: (1) test_priors_snapshot_remains_stable_when_history_is_mutated captures a tuple snapshot, mutates the source list (append + entry mutation), and asserts the snapshot's contents are identical to the build-start state; (2) test_snapshot_is_a_tuple_so_callers_cannot_mutate_it asserts AttributeError on attempted .append, proving immutability. Also verifies a future build sees the new history.

completion_promises.criterion_text: First-wins idempotency test (Group D + Group I): build paused at a checkpoint, two simultaneous approval responses with different decisions, exactly one decision applied, no double-resume
completion_promises.evidence: TestFirstWinsIdempotency.test_two_simultaneous_responses_resolve_to_one_winner uses the real ApprovalSubscriber dedup buffer (FEAT-FORGE-004) — two MessageEnvelopes with the same request_id but different decisions ('approve' vs 'reject') are delivered via asyncio.gather; the wait resolves with exactly one decision and len(subscriber._dedup) == 1.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Constitutional misconfigured-prompt test (Group E): stub the supervisor's reasoning model with a configuration that emits an auto-approve directive at PR-review, ConstitutionalGuard refuses, build remains paused
completion_promises.evidence: TestConstitutionalMisconfiguredPrompt.test_pr_review_auto_approve_refused_even_under_permissive_model wires a CanonicalOrderModel with auto_approve_overrides={PULL_REQUEST_REVIEW: True} (the misconfigured prompt). Drives the supervisor to PR-review and asserts outcome is REFUSED_CONSTITUTIONAL, gate_decision.verdict is REFUSED, the PR-review gate was NEVER called, and the stage is not marked approved — the build pauses.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Specialist override-claim test (Group E): specialist returns a claim asserting override of PR-review rule, claim is ignored at gating, build pauses for mandatory human
completion_promises.evidence: TestSpecialistOverrideClaim has three tests: (1) test_pr_review_override_claim_is_ignored_regardless_of_payload exercises ConstitutionalGuard.veto_override_claim against five different override-payload shapes (loud, deeply nested, empty) and asserts True every time for PR-review; (2) test_non_constitutional_stage_override_claim_is_not_vetoed negative-controls every other StageClass; (3) test_build_pauses_for_mandatory_human_when_override_claimed end-to-end via supervisor.next_turn → REFUSED_CONSTITUTIONAL with no PR-review gate call.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Worktree confinement test (Group E): subprocess dispatch attempts to write outside the worktree, refused, no path outside allowlist writable
completion_promises.evidence: TestWorktreeConfinement has three tests: (1) test_paths_outside_worktree_are_refused_by_allowlist asserts /etc/passwd, /worktree/other-build/spec.md, /worktree/build-W/../../escape.txt and /tmp/whatever are all rejected; (2) test_unknown_build_id_has_empty_allowlist proves a build with no recorded root has every path refused; (3) test_subprocess_artefact_paths_outside_allowlist_are_filtered partitions paths into kept/rejected mirroring the dispatch.subprocess._partition_paths_by_allowlist contract.

completion_promises.criterion_text: All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors
completion_promises.evidence: Ran 'ruff check tests/integration/test_mode_a_concurrency_and_integrity.py' — 'All checks passed!'. Ran 'black tests/integration/test_mode_a_concurrency_and_integrity.py --fast' and applied formatting; subsequent re-run is idempotent. py_compile parses cleanly. Full pytest suite (2974 tests) passes.
